descriptor.name: PaddleOCR (Cloud, PaddleOCR-VL-1.6)
descriptor.description: Baidu AI Studio's PaddleOCR-VL-1.6 high-accuracy model, async API. PDF and image only; Office / Excel / HTML fall back to the local parser.
